match.userMessage:
Smooth dolly backward as Scarlett stands fully upright from the vanity, shakes out her hair with a gentle head toss, and takes a natural step away from the white table while keeping the capped lipstick tube held steady in her open palm. Her posture shifts from still to forward motion with relaxed purpose. Morning sunlight creates soft moving highlights across the vanity surface and her linen shorts as fabric sways lightly with each step.

soft morning room tone with distant window light. subtle hair rustle, soft footsteps on floor.

Single continuous shot, no cuts. Avoid jitter and bent limbs.
